All Classes and Interfaces|All Packages|Constant Field Values

C

calculateDrawCount(int, int, int) - Static method in class com.example.eventlotterysystem.EventRepository
calculates how many users should be drawn from the waitlist pool.
calculateDrawCount_fillsAvailableSpots() - Method in class com.example.eventlotterysystem.EventRepositoryMathTest
checks that the draw count correctly fills the remaining available spots when there are more candidates than available capacity
calculateDrawCount_handlesFewerCandidatesThanSpots() - Method in class com.example.eventlotterysystem.EventRepositoryMathTest
checks that the draw count is limited by the number of candidates when there are fewer people waiting than there are available spots
calculateDrawCount_handlesFullEvent() - Method in class com.example.eventlotterysystem.EventRepositoryMathTest
checks that the draw count is zero when the event has already reached its maximum capacity of chosen or confirmed participants
calculateDrawCount_handlesOverfilledEvent() - Method in class com.example.eventlotterysystem.EventRepositoryMathTest
check that the draw count is zero if for some weird other reason the number of already chosen participants exceeds the maximum participant limit
canManageEvent(EventItem, String) - Static method in class com.example.eventlotterysystem.EventRepository
checks if the given user can manage a Event as the host or a coorganizer
canUserAccessEvent(boolean, boolean, boolean) - Static method in class com.example.eventlotterysystem.EventRepository
determines event access for the current user
canUserAccessEvent(EventItem, String, String) - Method in class com.example.eventlotterysystem.EventRepository
determines whether a user can access an event detail screen for private events, access is granted to the host and to anyone who already has a waitlist record for the event
canUserManageEvent(EventItem, String) - Method in class com.example.eventlotterysystem.EventRepository
determines whether a user can manage an event and organizer-only features
canUserManageOrganizerFeatures(String) - Method in class com.example.eventlotterysystem.EventRepository
checks whether the user can use organizer-only screens and actions

Custom activity for the QR code scanner interface

ChatMessageAdapter - Class in com.example.eventlotterysystem
Displays the messages inside a single chat thread.

creates the adapter for displaying chat messages in a conversation
ChatMessageItem - Class in com.example.eventlotterysystem
Represents a single chat message within a thread.
ChatMessageItem() - Constructor for class com.example.eventlotterysystem.ChatMessageItem
creates an empty chat message object for Firebase
ChatMessageItem(String, String, String, String, long) - Constructor for class com.example.eventlotterysystem.ChatMessageItem
creates a chat message object
chosenHistoryStatusShownTest() - Method in class com.example.eventlotterysystem.MyWaitlistActivityTest
Test that the waitlist history displays when a user was chosen for an event.
cleanExpiredTest() - Method in class com.example.eventlotterysystem.EntrantsActivityTest
Test to see if Clean will remove chosen entrants immediately and trigger a redraw
com.example.eventlotterysystem - package com.example.eventlotterysystem

Adapter used to display threaded event comments in a list.

Creates an adapter for displaying threaded comments.

Listener for user interactions on a comment row.

Represents a comment posted on an event.

Test if the confirmed entrants export builds CSV content in the expected format
constructor_storesAllFieldsCorrectly() - Method in class com.example.eventlotterysystem.CommentItemTest
Verifies that the constructor stores all comment fields correctly.
createEvent(FirebaseUser, EventItem, Uri) - Method in class com.example.eventlotterysystem.EventRepository
Manages task of creating an event document in the database may also add a posterUri if there is one which it then also uploads the image file to the database
CreateEventActivity - Class in com.example.eventlotterysystem
This is a class that is the controller of the activity_create_event screen this activity allows users to create events that will be added to the database is also used to edit an event by populating the input view with Event data
CreateEventActivity() - Constructor for class com.example.eventlotterysystem.CreateEventActivity
 
CreateEventActivityTest - Class in com.example.eventlotterysystem
Tests the functionality of the CreateEventActivity this activity allows an organiser to create a new event or edit one that already exists it also verifies that event data is saved correctly in the database
CreateEventActivityTest() - Constructor for class com.example.eventlotterysystem.CreateEventActivityTest
 
createEventTest() - Method in class com.example.eventlotterysystem.CreateEventActivityTest
test to see if an event object is created when a user creates an event
createUserTest() - Method in class com.example.eventlotterysystem.SignupActivityTest
Test to see if a user profile object is created when an account creation is attempted
